name: Charge Champs
short_description: Charge Champs is a 2D platform fighter with a unique combat system where players charge their character to temporarily unlock abilities and gain an advantage over their opponents.
detailed_description:
Charge Champs: Charge Champs pits up to four human or AI players against each other in a fast paced 2D platform fighter. Players pick between four unique characters, and their abilities, to create an experience that matches their fighting style. Charge Champs pits players in constant combat that charges their characters, temporarily unlocking their abilities to gain an advantage over their opponents. Use these advantages to pursue quick combos and devastating plays. With a unique art style, four playable levels, and two game modes; can you become the ultimate Charge Champion?

Featuring:
  • Local multiplayer with up to four human or AI players
  • A unique hand drawn art style
  • Four playable characters with individual special abilities
  • Two game modes and four curated levels
  • Over a dozen abilities to customize your play style
